signals.name: SerialNumber
signals.comment: Device serial number, allocated at manufacture.

signals.name: ActiveMotor
signals.comment: The index of the active motor currently being used.

signals.name: TxErrorCount
signals.comment: The DSP CAN transmission error counter (CAN 2.0)

signals.name: RxErrorCount
signals.comment: The DSP CAN receive error counter (CAN 2.0)

signals.name: Odometer
signals.comment: Distance the vehicle has travelled since reset.

signals.name: DCBusAh
signals.comment: Charge flow into the controller DC bus from the time of reset.
